EFF Gis; Ray; Larry Roberts; Walter E. Washington; Honorable Marvin Mandel

The project, initiated in 2023, aimed to develop a new AI-powered diagnostic tool for detecting skin cancer using image analysis. It was initially projected to significantly reduce diagnostic delays and improve patient outcomes. However, due to unforeseen technical challenges and a lack of sufficient data for robust model training, the project was ultimately cancelled in late 2024, with the team focusing on alternative approaches to enhance diagnostic accuracy.
